title: Global Sustainability Awards 2026 Opens Final Call for Entries as Industry Leaders Prepare to Celebrate Sustainability Excellence
author: Not Specified
description: The Global Sustainability Awards 2026 has announced a final call for entries, closing on 29th June 2026. The awards ceremony will take place on 8th September in London, celebrating sustainability excellence across six categories. The judging panel includes Chief Sustainability Officers from major global organizations including Google, Merck, RELX, Schneider Electric, and the BBC.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Google is featured as a judge on the expert panel with Adam Elman as Director of Sustainability – EMEA, demonstrating the company's commitment to sustainability leadership and active participation in recognizing industry excellence.

Google is featured as a judge on the expert panel with Adam Elman as Director of Sustainability – EMEA, demonstrating the company's commitment to sustainability leadership and active participation in recognizing industry excellence.
Merck is represented on the judging panel through a Chief Sustainability Officer, indicating strong corporate commitment to sustainability initiatives and industry leadership.
RELX is featured as a judge with Dr. Márcia Balisciano as Chief Sustainability Officer, demonstrating the company's active engagement in sustainability excellence recognition.
Schneider Electric is represented on the judging panel as Global Head of Sustainability, showcasing the company's leadership role in the sustainability space.

title: Major Global Brands Join Sustainability LIVE at London Climate Action Week 2026
author: Not Specified
description: Sustainability LIVE: The Leadership Summit announced the addition of 13 Chief Sustainability Officers and sustainability leaders from major global organizations ahead of London Climate Action Week 2026. The expanded speaker line-up includes executives from PepsiCo, Philip Morris International, RELX, ADM, and VINCI Group, among others. The summit will focus on practical insights regarding decarbonisation, sustainable supply chains, and climate action strategies.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Featured as a key speaker at a major sustainability leadership summit, demonstrating commitment to corporate sustainability transformation and climate action initiatives.
Represented by Chief Sustainability Officer at a prominent sustainability summit, indicating active engagement in sustainability leadership and corporate environmental initiatives.
Included among global organizations contributing sustainability expertise to the summit, signaling commitment to environmental and governance priorities.
Chief Sustainability Officer speaking on sustainable supply chains and decarbonisation, demonstrating proactive leadership in building resilient and transparent value chains.

title: Executives from Google, BBC, Schneider Electric and RELX Join 2026 Global Sustainability Awards Judging Panel
author: Not Specified
description: Sustainability Magazine and BizClik Media have announced the judging panel for the 2026 Global Sustainability Awards, taking place on 8 September 2026 in London. The panel comprises senior sustainability leaders from major global organizations including Google, Schneider Electric, BBC, Mercer, and RELX. The black-tie gala will recognize companies and executives excelling in sustainable business practices across eight award categories, with entries closing on 29 June 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Google is featured as a major participant in the judging panel with Adam Elman, Director of Sustainability – EMEA, indicating the company's commitment to sustainability leadership and recognition in the field.

Google is featured as a major participant in the judging panel with Adam Elman, Director of Sustainability – EMEA, indicating the company's commitment to sustainability leadership and recognition in the field.

RELX is featured on the judging panel with Dr. Márcia Balisciano as Chief Sustainability Officer, indicating the company's active involvement in recognizing and promoting sustainable business practices.

Mercer is represented on the judging panel by Cara Williams, Chief Sustainability Officer, demonstrating the company's leadership in sustainability and commitment to advancing corporate environmental and social practices.

Schneider Electric is highlighted as a key panelist with Sorouch Kheradmand as Global Head of Sustainability, demonstrating the company's active engagement in sustainability initiatives and industry leadership.

title: Credit Benchmark Appoints Dean Smith as New Chief Technology Officer to Propel Next Phase of Growth and Platform Innovation
author: Na
description: Credit Benchmark has appointed Dean Smith as Chief Technology Officer to scale its platform and advance data capabilities. Smith brings 25+ years of technology leadership experience, including a decade at RELX. The appointment follows strong growth in client adoption and platform usage, as financial institutions increasingly seek independent credit risk insight for private and unrated exposures.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: RELX is mentioned only as the previous employer of the newly appointed CTO. There is no information about RELX's business performance or strategic direction, making this a neutral mention in the context of the article.

title: LexisNexis® CounselLink® Releases 2026 Trends Report as Rising Rates and Big Law Share of Wallet Continue to Climb
author: Tracey Iverson
description: LexisNexis CounselLink's 2026 Trends Report reveals that average partner rates at law firms increased 5.1% in 2025, with the largest firms (750+ lawyers) capturing over half of total legal spend. High-value practice areas like M&A and Data Privacy saw even steeper rate increases of 8.8% and 8.4% respectively, while alternative fee arrangements remain limited at 8.3% of matters. Corporate legal departments face mounting challenges in controlling outside counsel costs.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company's CounselLink platform is positioned as a solution to help corporate legal departments manage rising costs and gain visibility into outside counsel spending. The report demonstrates ongoing demand for legal management solutions and analytics, supporting the value proposition of their offerings.
